title: Marks & Spencer India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Marks & Spencer India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Marks & Spencer India! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Srinagar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Marks & Spencer India:
Marks & Spencer India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Marks & Spencer India!
